title: Highway Asphalt Paver Coloring Page
seoTitle: Highway Road Asphalt Paver Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a detailed asphalt paving machine working on a highway project. Free printable PDF.

funFacts: The Highway Asphalt Paver works in close coordination with road rollers to build smooth highway surfaces.
Asphalt Highway Asphalt Pavers are road-laying machines that distribute and pre-compact hot asphalt evenly over the roadbed.
